reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
좋은가봐요 이것만갖고놀아요 하루종일 ㅋㅋㅋ
바시락소리가 재밌나봐요
reviews.content_en: She seems to love it! She plays with nothing but this all day long haha 😄 I think she finds the crinkly sound fun

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
원래 가지고 놀던 애착인형이였는데 다른 강아지가 놀러와서 ,,, 망가트려서 바잇미 제품인지몰랐는데 있길래 바로 주문했어요 ~ 
몇달만에 다시 만나는 애착인형인데도 엄청 좋아하네요 (사진투척🐶+왕빵댕이)
reviews.content_en: It was my pup's favorite stuffed toy originally, but then another dog came over to play and... ended up destroying it 😅 I didn't know it was a BITE ME product, but once I saw it, I ordered right away! After a few months, it's great to see her reunited with her beloved toy - she absolutely adores it now (attaching pics 🐶 + my silly girl)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 원래 저희 멍뭉이 애착인형이였는데 친구강쥐가 놀러와서 ㅠㅠ다 물어뜯어서...바잇미 제품인지 모르고잇다가 보자마자 바로 구매했어요 ㅠㅠㅠ 몇달만에 봐서 좋은지 엄청 잘 갖고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It was originally my Mengmung's favorite stuffed toy, but when my friend's puppy came to play, she chewed it all up 😭 I didn't know it was a BITE ME product at first, but I bought it right away as soon as I saw it! After a few months of being apart, she's so happy to have it back and plays with it constantly

reviews.name: y****
reviews.content:
너무 좋아해요 
바스락과 삑삑이와 노즈워크까지 가능한 장난감!!
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much! A toy that has crinkle sound AND squeakers AND nose work capabilities!!

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
아기자기하고 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ
한입에 물기 좋아 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and adorable 😊 It's easy to bite in one bite and she plays with it really well

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 재밌어해요!!  강아지 원픽 노즈워크
reviews.content_en: She loves it!! The nose work toy that this pup can't resist 🐕

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 솜이가 환장해요 여러개 사길 잘햇아요 버섯 머리에 줄달아서 모자로 쓸거예여 존예
reviews.content_en: Solmi is absolutely obsessed! I'm so glad I bought multiple! I'm going to tie a string to the mushroom cap and use it as a hat - it's going to look so cute

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 강쥐가 잘 갖고 놀아요~ 빠스락 소리도 많이 나고 모자(?) 부분이 너무 잘 빠질까봐 걱정했는데 적당히 타이트해요ㅎㅎ 버섯 몸통 부분에 삑삑이도 있음
reviews.content_en: My puppy loves to play with it~ It makes lots of crinkly sounds and I was worried the cap (?) part would fall off too easily, but it's tight enough hehe The mushroom body part also has a squeaker

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
머섯 모자?
머리 벗겨지는거 넘귀욥네요ㅋㅋ
사이즈도 적당해서
입이작은 아인데도 잘 가지구놀아요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
A mushroom cap?
The fact that the head comes off is so adorable haha
The size is just right too, so even my pup with a small mouth plays with it well haha

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 둘찌 강쥐 최애 장난감이 되어 버렸어요. 사이즈도 물고 놀기 딱 좋아서 계속 물고 있고 못 뺏어가게 막 지키구 있어요. 노즈워크도 잘 하구요 :)
reviews.content_en: It's become my Dulcci's (puppy's) favorite toy ever! The size is just perfect for biting and playing, so she keeps it in her mouth constantly and won't let anyone take it from her. She's also great at nose work with it :)

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
예전에 지인 강아지가 사용하는걸 봤는데 너무 귀여워서
비로 사고 싶었지만 저희 애기는 라텍스파..
인형 장난감은 잘 안가지고 놀아서 ㅠ 포기할까 했는데
아무리 봐도 제 취향이라 그냥 안가지고 놀면
방에 장식이라도 해둘려고 샀어요 위에 머리 벗겨지면
대머리 같아거 넘 웃겨요 ㅋㅋ너무 만족❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: I saw a friend's dog using this before and thought it was so cute, so I wanted to get it for Bi, but our baby is into latex toys... 😅 Since she doesn't really play with plush toys, I was thinking about giving up, but I really loved the design anyway, so I bought it just to decorate the room if she doesn't play with it. It's so funny when the head comes off and it looks like a bald head ㅋㅋ I'm so happy with it ❤️❤️

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 삑삑소리가 안 나는게 와서 고객센터에 문의 했더니 다음날 바로 새 장난감 보내주셨어요. 강아지가 삑삑이 너무 좋아하고 버섯 머리에 까까 숨겨주면 한참 잘 가지고 놀아서 가성비 좋은 노즈워크 장난감 찾는다면 강추합니다!
reviews.content_en: The squeaker wasn't working when it arrived, so I contacted customer service and they sent a replacement toy the very next day! My dog loves the squeaker so much, and when I hide treats in the mushroom head, she plays with it for a long time. Highly recommend if you're looking for a great value nose work toy!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 배송도 엄청 빠르고 노즈워크 장난감이여서 더 좋고! 강아지 입크기에 딱 알맞아서 ㅎㅎ 제일 좋아해요!
reviews.content_en: Shipping was super fast and it's a nose work toy which is even better! It's perfectly sized for my dog's mouth hehe The best!

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 원래 장난감 파괴왕인데 바잇미 버섯은 옴총 소중히 다루고 있답니다 ㅋㅋㅋ 버섯을 제일 좋아하네요 핥아주고 잘때도 갖고자고 ㅋㅋㅋ 넘모 소듕해요🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: Usually a toy-destroying machine, but Bite Me mushroom is being treated so preciously ㅋㅋㅋ She loves the mushroom the most, licks it and even sleeps with it ㅋㅋㅋ So precious 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 좋은데 하루만에 애가 다뜯어놔서 식겁했어욬ㅋㅋ ㅜㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and great, but she completely tore it apart in just one day and I was shocked ㅋㅋ ㅜㅠ

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
솔직히 제가 갖구 싶구 키링하고 싶지만 뚜비에게 양보했어요(?)
위에 모자 벗기면 대머리 너무 귀엽구 웃기구 난리나요
reviews.content_en: Honestly I wanted to keep it for myself and make it into a keychain (?), but I gave it to Doobi instead. It's so cute and hilarious when you take off the little hat and it becomes a bald head!

reviews.content: 이것저것 다른장난감들 마니 사줬지만 결국 최애장난감은 바잇미인거같아요 물고 뜯고해도 튼튼해서 항상 구매한답니다 이번 장난감도 성공
reviews.content_en: We've bought many different toys, but it seems like Bite Me is her ultimate favorite. Even after biting and chewing, it's so durable that we always buy it again. This toy is another success!

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content: 진짜 잘가지고놀아요! 버섯갓이랑 몸체가 따로 굴러다니지만 노즈워크할때도 잘 가지고놀고 던져달라고 물고오고 디자인도 너무 귀엽
reviews.content_en: She really plays with it so well! The mushroom cap and body roll around separately, but she still plays with it great for nose work, brings it back when asked to fetch, and the design is so cute!

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 사이즈가 너무 크면 어떡하지 했는데 다행히 딱 적당한 사이즈여서 입으로 물고 다니는데 불편함 없을거같아요 ㅎㅎ 너무 귀여워요!! 단품으로 산걸 후회할정도.. 버섯모자(?) 벗기니 새로운 아이같지만 ㅋㅋㅋ 초급 단계의 노즈워크 하기에 딱이에요!
reviews.content_en: I was worried the size might be too big, but fortunately it's just the right size! She can carry it in her mouth without any trouble ㅎㅎ It's so cute!! I almost regret buying just one... When you take off the mushroom hat(?), it's like a whole new toy ㅋㅋㅋ It's perfect for beginner-level nose work!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
엄청  귀엽고    버섯기둥을 입에 물고 놓지않습니다
작은 삑삑이들을 좋아해서  엄청좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: It's incredibly cute and she doesn't let go of the mushroom stem once she has it in her mouth. She loves the little squeakers so much, she's obsessed with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
화면 그대로 귀여워요
바스락 좋앙해요
reviews.content_en:
It's as cute as it looks in the pictures 😍
I love the crinkle sound!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
2년동안 함께 본가에서 살다가
몇개월전에 제가 나와살게 되면서 저희 휴지생각 날때마다
바잇미를 둘러보는데 버섯인형을 보자마자 제 이름과 비슷한 버섯과자가 생각나서 휴지가 저 보고싶을때마다 갖고놀아줬음싶은 마음에 본가에 보내려고 구매하게됐어요ㅎㅎ
머리가 분리되는 노즈워크 기능이 있다고해서 놀이를 좋아하는 휴지에게 더없이 좋은 인형친구가 되어줄것 같아서
기분이 좋네요ㅎㅎ
함께 구매한 세제로 깨끗이 잘 빨아서 줘야겠어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I lived with Huji at my parents' place for 2 years, but moved out a few months ago. Every time I miss Huji, I browse BITE ME, and as soon as I saw the mushroom toy, it reminded me of a mushroom snack with a similar name to mine. I wanted Huji to have something fun to play with when missing me, so I decided to buy it and send it home 😄 It has a nose work feature where the head separates, so it should be a perfect toy friend for Huji who loves to play. I'm so happy about it! I'll make sure to wash it nicely with the detergent I bought together 😄

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content:
무아지경 버섯 노즈워크🥰
안에 영양제 한알씩 넣어주면 난리나요!
그냥도 잘 가지고 놀아서 세트로 구매할까봐요!!
reviews.content_en:
Mushroom nose work that's absolutely addictive 🥰
If I put one vitamin in it, my pup goes crazy!
Even without treats, they play with it so well that I'm thinking of buying the set!!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 장난감을 4~5개?정도 구매한 것 같은데 그 중에서 울 아가가 처음 보자마자 관심가지고 놀았던 장난감이에요~~
바스락 소리가 잘 나서 그런지 간식을 넣어놓지않아도 재미있게 잘 가지고 논다능~☆^☆
reviews.content_en: I think I've bought 4-5 toys from BITE ME, and this is the one my baby was interested in and started playing with right away~~ Since it makes a nice crinkle sound, they have fun playing with it even without treats inside~☆^☆

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
처음에 너무 쉽게 빼먹어서  몸통을 아예 넣어줬더니 
한참 가지고 놀더라고요 근데 그것도 터득해서 ㅋ ㅋ 
10초컷이에요 ㅋ 
하도 침발라서 너덜너덜 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: At first it was too easy to pull out, so I put the whole body in instead and they played with it for a while, but then they figured that out too ㅋㅋ It's done in 10 seconds ㅋ They drool on it so much it's gotten all torn up ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 보리 크리스마스 선물 너무 좋아해요!!!!
reviews.content_en: Bori absolutely loves the Christmas gift!!!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요~ 삑삑 소리 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and my puppy loves playing with it~ They really love the squeaky sound!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요!!
요즘 새 장난감을 좋아하길래 아무거나 골라 담아봤는데 머리 뚜껑이 열려서 너무 귀엽ㅋㅋ
거기에 간식 넣어두면 노즈워크도 되서 보는 재미도 쏠쏠해요.
머리를 뽑아!! 기둥을 뽑으란 말이야!!! 라고 하며 응원도 하게 되요.
갓부분은 바스락 소리도 나요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
It's so cute!!
My dog's been into new toys lately so I just grabbed this, and the detachable head cap is adorable ㅋㅋ You can put treats in it for nose work too, so it's fun to watch. I even find myself cheering 'Pull the head! Pull the stem!!!' The hat part makes a crinkle sound too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: r****
reviews.content: 아 저는 버섯 몸통이랑 모자(?) 부분이 분리되는 줄 몰랐어요ㅋㅋ 너무너무 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: Oh, I didn't know the mushroom body and hat(?) part separated ㅋㅋ It's so so cute!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 하기에도 너무좋고
애들이 너무좋아해요.
바잇미 오래 아가들곁에 있어주세요
reviews.content_en:
It's great for nose work
The kids love it so much.
BITE ME, please be by our babies' sides for a long time

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 바스락 몸통은 빽빽이로 소형견에 잘맞고 좋아해요 장난감을 잘가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: The crinkly body with dense stuffing fits small dogs perfectly, and my pup loves it! She plays with the toy really well 🐕

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 사진찍을라니까 또 훔쳐감.. 바스락에 환장합니다ㅜㅜ 관종임...ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: She keeps stealing it when I try to take a photo.. She's absolutely obsessed with the crinkle toy ㅜㅜ She's such a diva...ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 귀여운 버섯노즈워크 너무 재밌게 잘 갖고놉니다
reviews.content_en: The cute mushroom nose work toy is so much fun! My dog plays with it really well 😊

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 농장 노즈워크에 쏙 넣어서 함께 사용중입니다! 버섯 모자에 노즈워크 잘해요a
reviews.content_en: I'm using it together with the farm nose work toy by putting the treats inside! She does the nose work really well with the mushroom cap 🎉

reviews.name: 초****
reviews.content: 모자쓰고있을때는 귀여운데..ㅎ
reviews.content_en: She looks adorable when she's wearing the cap..ㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 버섯 머리빨이구나?(ㅋㅋㅋ)
reviews.content_en: So the mushroom head is the real star, huh? (ㅋㅋㅋ)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
새로운 노즈워크가 필요했음 !
지극히 내 스타일로 고른 아이들
너무너무 귀여웡 ㅜㅜ 
새끼손톱만한 노즈워크 간식을
그마저도 반을 잘라 넣어줍니다
너무 잘빼먹어서ㅡㅡ ㅋ ㅋ 
잘라 넣어주니 성질나서 씩씩거리는데
그것도 귀여워 .. ㅋ ㅋ ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
I needed a new nose work toy! 🐕
I picked these with my own style in mind
They're so incredibly cute ㅜㅜ
I put tiny pinky-nail-sized treats in the nose work toy
But even that much, I have to cut it in half before putting it in
Because she's SO good at finding them ㅡㅡ ㅋ ㅋ
When I cut them smaller and put them in, she gets all huffy and snorts a little
But that's cute too.. ㅋ ㅋ ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 너무 좋아해서 버섯 6개에 바나나 2개면
신나게 놀고 잘때 코골아요
노견이라 인형 잘 안가지고 노는데 역시 간식의 힘이란 ㅎㅎ 너무 이뻐서 토이바스켓에 넣어두면 나름또 아기자기 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves the nose work toy so much that with 6 mushroom pieces and 2 banana pieces, she plays excitedly and even snores when she sleeps 😴 She's a senior dog and doesn't usually play with plush toys, but you really can't beat the power of treats ㅎㅎ She's so adorable that I keep them in a toy basket and they look so neat and cute there too!

reviews.name: h****
reviews.content: 버섯 모자 안에 간식을 넣어두면 간식 냄새가 안 나는지 찾기 어려워 해요. 제가 버섯 기둥을 잡아주면 강아지가 앞발로 버섯 모자를 벗기는 식으로 같이 사용하고 있어요. 아주 귀엽습니다.
reviews.content_en: When I put treats inside the mushroom cap, they're hard to find because the treat smell doesn't escape. I hold the mushroom stem while my dog uses her front paws to peel off the mushroom cap—we use it together that way. It's absolutely adorable.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락과 삑삑이가 다 있어 좋아요
바로 분리가 되는 바람에 노즈워크는 넘 쉬워서..ㅋㅋ 그냥 장난감으로 놀아요
분리되는 바람에 거의 버섯대? 밑에 부분만 들고 놀게 되는거 같아용 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
I like that it has both the crinkle and the squeaky parts 🐕
But they separate pretty easily, so the nose work is super simple for her.. ㅋㅋ She just plays with it as a regular toy
Because they separate so easily, she basically just ends up playing with the bottom part of the mushroom stem ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: ㅅ****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감 다 너무 귀여워요 ㅜㅜ 버섯 머리랑 몸통이 생각보다 꽉 들어맞아서 그 안에 간식 넣어주면 잘 못 빼더라구요 머리에만 넣어서 갖고 놀고 있어요.
reviews.content_en: BITE ME toys are all so cute 😭 The mushroom head and body fit together tighter than I expected, so when I put treats inside, he can't get them out easily. I just put them in the head and he plays with it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠ 곧 애착인형이 될 거 같다는...!! 처음엔 갖고 노는 것도 어려워했는데 몇 번 하니까 너무 잘 해요 다른 것도 왕창 사줄려구요!!
reviews.content_en: So cute 😭 I feel like it's going to become his favorite toy soon!! At first he had trouble playing with it, but after a few tries he's gotten really good at it. I'm planning to buy a bunch of other ones!!

reviews.name: 규****
reviews.content: 이거 진짜 좋아요! 바스락 거리는 장난감이랑 노즈워크 장난감 찾고 있었는데 완전 만족!! 머리가 떼어져서 재미잇게 가지고 놀 수 있을 것 같아요!!
reviews.content_en: This is really great! I was looking for a crinkly toy and a nose work toy and I'm totally satisfied!! The head comes off so it looks like he'll have fun playing with it!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 일을 시작하게 돼서 노즈워크가 부족하게 느껴져 구입하게 됐어요. 애들이 노즈워크로도 잘 사용하고 장난감으로도 너무 잘 사용해서 만족하는 제품입니다
reviews.content_en: I started working full-time and felt like my dogs weren't getting enough nose work, so I decided to buy this. My dogs use it well for nose work and also play with it as a regular toy, so I'm very satisfied with this product.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 버섯 너무 귀여워요. 버섯머리에 바잇미 미니 트릿 넣어주니 아주 요리조리 잘 갖구 놀아서 만족! 버섯대 누르면 삑삑 소리도 나니 아주 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: The mushroom is so adorable. I put BITE ME mini treats in the mushroom head and they play with it so well, tossing it around—very satisfied! Plus it makes a squeaky sound when you press the mushroom stem, which is really nice.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
사이즈가 많이 작아서 좀..그랬는데 퀄리티가 너무 좋아요ㅎ
많은 장난감을 구입해서 아직 개봉은 안했지만 우리 댕댕이 바잇미장난감 좋아해요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: The size is a bit small, which was a little disappointing, but the quality is amazing 😄 I bought a lot of toys and haven't opened them yet, but my pup loves BITE ME toys 😄

reviews.name: l****
reviews.content: 제가 쓸건아니라 아직 사용은 안해봤지만 너무 기여워용....처음사보는 곳이라 반신반의 하며 구매했는데 앞으로 강아지용품은 여기서 사려규용!
reviews.content_en: I'm not going to use it myself so I haven't tried it yet, but it's so cute 😍 Since it was my first time buying from here, I was skeptical at first, but from now on I'm buying all my dog supplies here!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 안에 간식 숨겨서 줬는데 너무 좋아합니당 그리고 버섯머리 벗겨지는 게 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋㅋ 바스락거리고 삑삑이도 있어서 계속 가지고 노네용
reviews.content_en: I hid treats inside and gave it to him and he loves it so much 😊 And the mushroom head coming off is so cute haha. It crinkles and has a squeaker too, so he just keeps playing with it.

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 신상 나오자마자 너무 귀여워서 바로 주문했어요  장난감 새거를 너무좋아해서 이번에도 너무 좋아했어요 분리되는 머리부분을 더 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: As soon as the new design came out, I ordered it right away because it was so cute. He loves new toys so he really loved this one too. He especially loves the removable head part.

reviews.name: i****
reviews.content: 비록 반려견은 없지만 인형 애호가인 저는 혼자 삑삑 거리며 혼자 가지고 놀고 있습니다. 웬만한 강아지 보다 더 잘 갖고 놉니다.
reviews.content_en: Although I don't have a pet dog, as a plush toy enthusiast, I'm playing with it by myself, squeaking it myself. I'm playing with it better than most dogs would.
